text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By now, Eishin Flash has a number of victories
under her belt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sorting through her race history, I realize
something...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So I have won two G1 races at the Tokyo
Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
G1 races are no easy undertaking to begin with.
On top of that, it's incredible to think she's won
twice on the same racecourse.
choice_data_list: You must be good with Tokyo.
You must be good with Tokyo.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, apologies. I understand that you are talking
about the venue itself, but I found your phrasing
humorous.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I don't think I am good with Tokyo at all...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
On the first day of my exchange program, I
traveled from the airport to the academy's closest
station on my own.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was told someone would be there to meet me,
but I was confident in my ability to follow the
directions to the school.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I left the airport and found the station in the
terminal without issue.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However... that is where I became lost. A map of
the station building was not included in the route
itinerary.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, the station was crammed with shops
in each direction, causing me to become
disoriented...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was so flustered, I started speaking to a station
attendant in German.
choice_data_list: It's hard for me to picture you getting lost.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That was the one and only time, though. From
then on, I made a point to photograph building
maps for future reference.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So to suddenly be told I am "good with Tokyo" is
a very interesting turn of events.
choice_data_list: Now you can say you are with pride.
Now you can say you are with pride.
